source_gate.reason: Official SEC 10-Q/10-K Item 408 text is present, but bounded probe did not establish >=150 timestamp-safe liquid mapped issuer events after conservative filters; hit set is concentrated and includes duplicate-class issuer exposure.
concentration_notes: Only 9 sampled liquid issuer tickers produced parsed valid events before the 120-filing cap.
GOOG/GOOGL are duplicate share classes for one issuer in the probe universe, so issuer-level breadth is overstated by ticker counts.
The largest ticker-level event share was about 20.8%, before consolidating duplicate classes.
source_gate.timestamp_discipline: SEC filing documents were fetched from official EDGAR URLs via submissions metadata; no event table was retained because the source gate failed.

provenance.source_probe: bounded SEC company_tickers, submissions JSON, and 10-Q/10-K primary-document scan; no raw filing text stored
